title: ageratina cumbensis
intro: Ageratina cumbensis, also known as Cundinamarca wood's rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits associated with Ageratina cumbensis include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Ageratina cumbensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
